name: Mary Coombs
oneLiner: Hartree's new H100 system for industry and public-sector AI, delivering 10x the performance of its predecessor.
summary: Mary Coombs launched in October 2025 at the STFC Hartree Centre, replacing Scafell Pike as the centre's flagship AI and data-science platform. The system combines 157 compute nodes powered by NVIDIA H100 GPUs into a 24.41 PFLOP GPU-based supercomputer delivered through a platform-as-a-service model. Hartree positions it as a flexible system for industry, academia, and public-sector organisations that need GPU capacity and applied expertise in AI optimisation and visualisation.

keyFacts.hardware: 157 compute nodes powered by NVIDIA H100 GPUs
keyFacts.energy: Uses 75% less energy than its predecessor

access.route: Available as a managed platform-as-a-service for industry, academia, and public-sector organisations through the Hartree Centre.
